_description: Unified indicator / derived-variable library for NHEFS analyses. Each key is a variable name; M4 and M6 read this file to construct derived columns. New indicators are appended here (not as separate files).

nhefs_bmi_baseline.name: nhefs_bmi_baseline
nhefs_bmi_baseline.label: Baseline BMI (kg/m²)
nhefs_bmi_baseline.formula_notes: N1BM0260 is weight in kg*100 (implied decimal). N1BM0266 is height in cm*10 (implied decimal). Divide appropriately before computing BMI.
nhefs_bmi_baseline.notes: Physically measured weight and height. More reliable than self-reported.

nhefs_comorbidity.name: nhefs_comorbidity
nhefs_comorbidity.label: Baseline comorbidity count (0-3)
nhefs_comorbidity.component_recode: Recode 1 or 2 to 1 (yes), 3 to 0 (no), 8 to NaN
nhefs_comorbidity.notes: Phase-1 minimal comorbidity count. Phase 2 can expand with additional conditions from DU4081 and DU4091.

nhefs_education_cat.name: nhefs_education_cat
nhefs_education_cat.label: Education categories (5-level)
nhefs_education_cat.notes: NCHS education codes from DU4111_F.sas PROC FORMAT BM0112F. Exact code-to-grade mappings should be verified against the formatted SAS script.

nhefs_heavy_drinker.name: nhefs_heavy_drinker
nhefs_heavy_drinker.label: Heavy drinker at 1982 (binary)
nhefs_heavy_drinker.formula: 1 if M12 in (3, 4) (moderate-heavy or heavy), 0 if M12 in (1, 2) (non/light-moderate), NaN if M12=7 (non-drinker skip) or 9
nhefs_heavy_drinker.notes: M12 is self-rated drinking intensity: 1=non-drinker, 2=light-moderate, 3=moderate-heavy, 4=heavy, 7=NA (skip). Exact category labels need codebook PDF verification.

nhefs_smoking_status.name: nhefs_smoking_status
nhefs_smoking_status.label: Smoking status at 1982 (3-category)
nhefs_smoking_status.formula: 0=never smoker (L1!=1), 1=current smoker (L1=1 AND L2a=1), 2=quit (L1=1 AND L2a=2)
nhefs_smoking_status.notes: Extends the binary qsmk to include never-smokers as a third category. Useful for descriptive analyses.
